summary: Iteration 133: Organizer Participant Migration Verification - All tests pass. Verified that the migration correctly added 209 org-participant records with proper fields (is_organizer=True, role='organizer', status='accepted_pending_guarantee', migrated_at exists). Modification flow works correctly: appointment 7e2270b1 returns mode='direct' (org-participant excluded from non_org_accepted count), appointment 3e2f572f returns status='pending' (has accepted non-org participants). Frontend correctly displays organizer in participant list with 'Org.' badge.

backend_api_tests.test_03_migrated_org_participant_fields: PASS - Org-participant has is_organizer=True, role='organizer', status='accepted_pending_guarantee', migrated_at exists
backend_api_tests.test_04_participants_includes_organizer: PASS - GET /api/participants/ includes organizer with is_organizer=True
backend_api_tests.test_06_direct_modification_mode: PASS - POST /api/modifications/ returns mode='direct', status='auto_applied' for appointment with 0 accepted non-org
backend_api_tests.test_07_participants_apt2_has_accepted_n: PASS - Appointment 3e2f572f has accepted non-org participant (igaal@hotmail.com)
backend_api_tests.test_09_proposal_mode: PASS - POST /api/modifications/ returns status='pending' for appointment with accepted non-org

frontend_tests.login_and_dashboard: PASS - Login successful, dashboard loads with 35 engagements
frontend_tests.appointment_7e2270b1_detail: PASS - Shows organizer 'Test Audit' with 'Org.' badge and 'Garantie en cours' status
frontend_tests.appointment_3e2f572f_detail: PASS - Shows organizer 'Test Audit' with 'Org.' badge and accepted participant 'Igaal Hanouna' with 'Garanti' status

migration_org_participant_fields.description: Migration correctly sets is_organizer=True, role='organizer', status='accepted_pending_guarantee', and adds migrated_at timestamp

direct_modification_excludes_org_partici.description: non_org_accepted filter correctly excludes participants with is_organizer=True, so migrated org-participants don't affect modification mode

participants_api_includes_organizer.description: GET /api/participants/ returns all participants including organizer with is_organizer=True

frontend_organizer_display.description: Organizer participant displayed with 'Org.' badge in participant list

critical_code_review_comments: Migration script is idempotent and safe to run multiple times
Org-participant exclusion logic in modification_service.py correctly uses is_organizer flag
Frontend correctly displays organizer badge for participants with is_organizer=True
context_for_next_testing_agent: Migration verified. 209 org-participant records added with migrated_at tag. Key logic: modification_service.py line 89 filters non_org_accepted = [p for p in participants if not p.get('is_organizer')], so org-participants are excluded from vote count. Appointment 7e2270b1 has org-participant with status='accepted_pending_guarantee' but is_organizer=True, so it's excluded → direct mode. Appointment 3e2f572f has both org-participant AND accepted non-org participant (igaal@hotmail.com) → proposal mode.

rca_of_the_issue.original_issue: 209+ appointments created before the org-participant feature was introduced were missing organizer participant records
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The seed_demo.py script and early appointment creation flow didn't inject org-participant records
fix_implemented: 1. Created migrate_add_org_participants.py to add missing org-participant records
2. Migration sets is_organizer=True, role='organizer', status='accepted_pending_guarantee', migrated_at timestamp
3. Fixed seed_demo.py to inject org-participant on future seeds (lines 498-517)
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 13 backend tests pass, frontend correctly displays organizer in participant list with 'Org.' badge
